THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1324. THE FACTS THAT ARE THE SUBJECT OF THE AMENDMENT AROSE AFTER THE FILING OF THE ORIGINAL COMPLAINT AND ARE DIFFERENT THAN THOSE "GENERAL SET OF FACTS" THAT FORMED THE BASIS OF THE EARLIER PLEADINGS.
